title: Add delegatee Merkle inclusion proof to Delegation circuit

artifacts.description: Add agentTreeRoot as public input; add merkleProof (pathElements[20], pathIndices[20]) as private inputs; instantiate BinaryMerkleRoot(20) component; constrain root output === agentTreeRoot; wire delegateeCredCommitment as leaf
Existing BinaryMerkleRoot(MAX_DEPTH) template — verify it is already present and importable; no changes expected
Regenerated Groth16 verifier from updated circuit; replace existing verifier bytecode
Accept agentTreeRoot as calldata param; validate it exists in the on-chain root history buffer (shared with IdentityRegistry); revert if root is unknown or expired
Updated circuit specification: public/private input table, Merkle proof format, root history buffer interface, soundness argument for delegatee inclusion
Circom unit tests: valid proof passes; proof with fabricated commitment (leaf not in tree) fails constraint; proof with wrong root fails; proof with correct leaf at varying depths passes
Solidity tests: submit delegation with valid root in history → success; submit with stale/unknown root → revert; replay attack with old root → revert

Update proof generation helper to accept agentTree MerkleProof witness (pathElements, pathIndices, leaf index); fetch current agentTreeRoot from on-chain or cached state; pass all inputs to snarkjs fullProve
Document the phantom delegatee vulnerability, the fix, the trust model for agentTreeRoot, and upgrade path for existing delegations

steps: Audit BinaryMerkleRoot(MAX_DEPTH) template: confirm it accepts leaf + pathElements[MAX_DEPTH] + pathIndices[MAX_DEPTH] and outputs root; verify it is poseidon-hashed and matches the hash used for delegateeCredCommitment

Update circuits/delegation/delegation.circom: add signal input agentTreeRoot (public); add signal input merklePathElements[20] and merklePathIndices[20] (private); add component merkleCheck = BinaryMerkleRoot(20); wire leaf = delegateeCredCommitment, path inputs, and constrain merkleCheck.root === agentTreeRoot
Recompile circuit with circom 2.x; run snarkjs groth16 setup with new .r1cs; regenerate proving key and verification key; export new verifier contract
Replace DelegationVerifier.sol with regenerated verifier; update ABI references throughout contracts/

Update DelegationRegistry.sol: add agentTreeRoot parameter to submitDelegation(); call IRootHistory.isKnownRoot(agentTreeRoot) and revert with UnknownAgentRoot() if false; emit agentTreeRoot in DelegationSubmitted event
Implement or verify IRootHistory interface is already shared with IdentityRegistry's root history buffer; if not, extract to shared library contract
Write circuit unit tests covering: (a) honest witness at depth 1..20, (b) fabricated leaf not in tree → expect constraint failure, (c) correct leaf wrong root → expect constraint failure
Write DelegationRegistry contract tests covering root validation, stale root rejection, and event emission
Update SDK prover.ts to build Merkle witness from agentTree snapshot; expose helper to fetch latest agentTreeRoot from chain
Update spec and security docs; bump circuit version constant in all relevant files
Run full test suite; verify no regressions in downstream circuits consuming scopeCommitment
Coordinate trusted setup ceremony or use existing Powers of Tau if constraint count fits; document entropy source
dependencies: IRootHistory on-chain root buffer shared with IdentityRegistry
Poseidon hash consistency between delegateeCredCommitment construction and Merkle leaf hashing
Powers of Tau ceremony supporting at least 2^16 constraints
